title: Cisco security advisory (AV26-197)
description: On March 4, 2026, Cisco published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products. Included were critical updates for the following:
products: Cisco Security Cloud Control (SCC) Firewall Management  all versions
Cisco Secure Firewall Management Center (FMC)  all versions
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
